block_01: Trading is quite complicated and there isn’t one person who only makes constant profits. Everyone bears losses once in a while. Traders may lose their investment for different reasons: lack of knowledge and experience, emotional trading, flawed risk management technique or its complete absence.
block_02: In this article we are looking at the reasons why traders lose, how to break a losing streak and turn these unfavorable conditions around.
block_03: How to have more control over your investments? Check the full article to find out.
